core.label: Racket Fundamentals
core.description: A language-oriented programming language built on Scheme.

topics.label: Installation & DrRacket
topics.description: Install Racket and use DrRacket IDE. Racket is batteries-included.

topics.label: Syntax & #lang
topics.description: Choose language with #lang racket. Racket is a platform for creating languages.

topics.label: Lists & Structs
topics.description: Linked lists and struct for records. Racket structs are like classes.

topics.label: Contracts
topics.description: Define and enforce function contracts. Runtime verification of interfaces.

topics.label: Macros
topics.description: syntax-parse and define-syntax for hygienic macros. Racket's macro system is world-class.

topics.label: Modules & Packages
topics.description: require/provide for modules, raco pkg for packages.

topics.label: Testing (rackunit)
topics.description: Built-in testing with check-equal?, check-true, test-suite.
